title: Classic Pancakes
ingredients: Flour, Milk, Eggs, Sugar, Baking Powder
instructions: Mix ingredients. Pour on griddle. Flip. Serve.
author: admin

title: Fluffy French Toast
ingredients: Bread, Eggs, Milk, Cinnamon, Vanilla, Butter
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla. Dip bread. Fry until golden brown.
author: admin

title: Egg & Bacon Burrito
instructions: Cook eggs and bacon. Assemble into tortilla with cheese and salsa. Roll up.
author: admin

title: Vegan Avocado Toast
ingredients: Bread, Avocado, Salt, Pepper, Lemon Juice
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado with lemon, salt, and pepper. Spread on toast.
author: admin

title: Chickpea Buddha Bowl
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Drizzle with hummus.
author: admin

title: Tofu Stir-fry
ingredients: Tofu, Broccoli, Carrot, Soy Sauce, Ginger, Garlic
instructions: Cube and fry tofu. Add veggies and sauce. Stir-fry for 10 mins.
author: admin

title: Chocolate Lava Cake
instructions: Melt chocolate. Mix with other ingredients. Bake at 400F for 10-12 mins.
author: admin

title: Berry Cheesecake
ingredients: Cream Cheese, Graham Crackers, Berries, Sugar, Vanilla
instructions: Press crackers into base. Top with cheese mixture. Chill and add berries.
author: admin

title: Apple Crumble
ingredients: Apples, Oats, Flour, Brown Sugar, Cinnamon, Butter
instructions: Slice apples with cinnamon. Top with oat mixture. Bake until bubbly.
author: admin

title: Grilled Lemon Salmon
ingredients: Salmon, Lemon, Garlic, Asparagus, Olive Oil
instructions: Season salmon. Grill with asparagus. Serve with fresh lemon.
author: admin

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
ingredients: Pasta, Eggs, Cheese, Pancetta, Black Pepper
instructions: Boil pasta. Fry pancetta. Mix pasta with eggs and cheese off-heat.
author: admin

title: Vegetable Risotto
ingredients: Arborio Rice, Broth, Zucchini, Peas, Onion, Parmesan
instructions: Sauté onions and rice. Gradually add broth. Stir in veggies and cheese.
author: admin
